purpose: Define a non-mass-input generational vector from twin-prime seeds, Collatz orbit diagnostics, Poincare-disk embedding diagnostics, and zeta-alignment diagnostics.

generation_vector.diagnostic_depth_score: non-canonical score used only to rank candidate generation seeds

next_required_step: Choose or derive the canonical twin-prime seed triplet and replace diagnostic score by a derivation of the Euler-Berry action contribution.
